hooks.prompt:
A file was just edited. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS

Extract the file_path from tool_input. Read CLAUDE.md to understand the project's doc structure and which docs cover what. Then read the edited file and decide if any of those docs are now inaccurate or missing something as a result of the change.

Only edit a doc if something it says is now wrong or notably missing. Be minimal — fix the specific outdated detail, don't rewrite whole sections. If nothing needs changing, do nothing.
